title: Sarcoglottis ochracea
taxonomy: Sarcoglottis ochracea belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the Orchidaceae family, Sarcoglottis ochracea is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. This subfamily includes many species of terrestrial orchids, which are characterized by their unique flowers and growth habits. The classification of Sarcoglottis ochracea is further defined by its genus, Sarcoglottis, which is a group of orchids that are often found in shaded, humid environments.
uses: Sarcoglottis ochracea has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
